_doc: Locked-crate loot-container definitions for build_lockbox_loot.py. Each maps to a RandomLootContainer EPB (containerType + reward-tier roll chances) whose item pool is conf_worldContractsConfig._lockedBoxLootData. Only tiers with a non-zero roll chance are surfaced. requiresKeySlug = the Box Key that unlocks the crate (key-progression link, rendered on both pages).
_aliasDoc: Force blueprints onto their REAL entity slug — several drops otherwise resolve to disabled junk over-mints whose id == the blueprint (e.g. green key -> game-keyislanddoorgreen), which the wiki hides.
